question: When faced with an incredible or fantastic claim, what shall we do according to the author?
correct_answer: Ask questions and look for proof.

hints.hint_1: Every day from the time we wake up until the time we go to bed, we are bombarded with information from all sides, from TV, radio, newspapers and books; from family, friends, and colleagues.
hints.hint_2: As a new cable television subscriber, I am  ly amazed at the quantity and varying levels of information quality on cable television.
hints.hint_3: Including the networks, there are eight TV "news" organizations vying to provide us with all the information we can possibly absorb.

question: Which of the following could NOT be the reason for the attraction of civil servant?

hints.hint_1: The huge thirst for jobs in the civil service has made the national civil servant  exam one of China's most competitive tests.
hints.hint_2: Of the 17,330 respondents, about 83 percent said they were attracted by the job's stability, guaranteed health care and pension .
hints.hint_3: Positions as civil servants are attractive, not only because of the stable income and good health care, but also because of the low risks compared with the power and resources the positions enjoy.

question: According to the passage, you will not reach you goals, if you   _  .
correct_answer: do not take time to make plans for them.

hints.hint_1: To help us succeed in reaching our goals, let's examine the reasons why many people fail at reaching them.
hints.hint_2: Well, you definitely won't complete them if you don't try.
hints.hint_3: Make sure that your goals are possible and that you set an adequate time frame for success.

question: We can infer that in the opinion of the writer's father_.
correct_answer: people in India shouldn't celebrate Valentine's Day

hints.hint_1: On Valentine's Day , I waited in line with many other teenagers just for a chance to get into the store.
hints.hint_2: Unfortunately, Valentine's Day passed and I received nothing but a lecture from my father on how Western capitalism  was ruining your culture.
hints.hint_3: The next Valentine's Day, I still didn't have a boyfriend, but I did receive a greeting card from a secret admirer.

question: Which is TRUE about the origin of language?
correct_answer: Words did not haven written form, at first.

hints.hint_1: How men first learnt to invent words is unknown; in other words, the origin of language is a mystery.
hints.hint_2: Those sounds, whether spoken, or written in letters, we call words.
hints.hint_3: Great writers are those who not only have great thoughts but also express these thoughts in words which appeal powerfully to our minds and emotions.

question: The passage is most probably written by  _  .

hints.hint_1: The last exams finished on Thursday, June 3, although I completed my final one on Monday morning.
hints.hint_2: Friends and families of students arrived to see the Senior Talent Show and the Baccalaureate  Service in the school hall.
hints.hint_3: There were speeches from the head of school, the president of the board and by a student representative.

question: The purpose of the contest is to   _  .

hints.hint_1: So, join in the fun, catch the excitement of your child on film while fishing and enter his or her picture in the yearly Kids Fishing Photo Contest!
hints.hint_2: The contest is sponsored by Virginia Department of Game and Inland Fisheries (VDGIF) in celebration of National Fishing Week!
hints.hint_3: Children in the first through third place photographs of each category will receive different fishing-related prizes.

question: Which position is open to recent school graduates?

hints.hint_1:
Wanted, Someone for a Kiss
We' re looking for producers to join us on the sound of London Kiss 100 FM.
hints.hint_2: You' ll work on the station's music programmes.
hints.hint_3: Music production experience in radio is necessary, along with rich knowledge of modern dance music.

question: As the author suggests, schools for troubled teens  _  .
correct_answer: can be a good choice for some desperate parents

hints.hint_1: Schools for troubled teens offer discipline and in some cases, drug treatment programs that can provide important life skills, and more importantly, a fresh start.
hints.hint_2: Not every facility is a match for every child, but by knowing the differences between them, parents can make a better educated decision about where to send their teenager.
hints.hint_3:
Boarding Schools
When a child is unable to deal with the relative freedom of a standard school day, boarding schools might be a good choice.

question: These years many   _   die in the water when they swim happily.

hints.hint_1: People like swimming in summer because water makes people feel cool.
hints.hint_2: These years, a lot of people die when they enjoy themselves in water, and most of them are students.
hints.hint_3: Some people are not careful when they are swimming.
